rationale: Heavy Russian air raids killing 11 and burning a historic cathedral in Kyiv are a continuation of established active combat patterns; no qualitative escalation beyond the ongoing war baseline.

top_events.title: Russian strikes kill 11 and set historic cathedral in Kyiv ablaze
top_events.summary: Continued heavy Russian bombardment of Kyiv causes civilian deaths and destroys cultural heritage. This is ongoing active war — devastating but not a qualitative new escalation beyond the established baseline.

top_events.title: 'Island surrounded by war': Crimeans panic amid Ukrainian attacks
top_events.summary: Ukrainian strikes on Crimea intensifying, causing panic among residents there — signals continued Ukrainian offensive pressure on occupied territory, relevant to war trajectory.

top_events.title: Iran, US agree tentative deal to 'end war': Your questions answered
top_events.summary: US-Iran deal continuation reduces likelihood of US attention and resources being diverted away from Ukraine support, a mild indirect positive for Ukraine's strategic position.
